behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction explicitly names all asserted paths (network.ts, testInfo.ts, program.ts, daemon.ts, browserBackend.ts, SKILL.md, playwright-tests.md), function names (decorateServer, sessionConfigFromArgs, runDaemonForContext, startMcpDaemonServer), property name (_onDidFinishTestFunctionCallbacks), literal values (timeout=0, actionTimeout=5000, PWPAUSE='cli'), and SKILL.md frontmatter keys.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction prescribes exact names and values: '_onDidFinishTestFunctionCallbacks' (plural, Set), 'timeout = 0', 'actionTimeout = 5000', 'for...of loop', 'noShutdown' parameter name — these are implementation details rather than behavioral descriptions.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert gold-specific details: test_finish_callbacks_is_set requires literal 'Set()' in compiled JS and exact identifier '_onDidFinishTestFunctionCallbacks'; test_pwpause_cli_overrides greps for literal 'process.env.PWPAUSE === "cli"' and 'timeout = 0'; test_daemon_accepts_no_shutdown requires literal '!noShutdown' or 'noShutdown === false' — alternative correct implementations (e.g., Map, different param name, different equality style) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute npm run tsc/lint/test-types and use node to require() compiled modules and inspect exports/function signatures rather than just grepping source.

test_not_tautological.reason: Stubs returning defaults wouldn't satisfy export checks, function-signature inspection for 'noShutdown', or the compiled-JS literal checks.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All 8 required behaviors in instruction (PWPAUSE=cli, callbacks Set, noShutdown, runDaemonForContext, decorateServer export, sessionConfigFromArgs export, SKILL.md, reference doc) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (pass-to-pass, Gates, fail-to-pass behavioral, agent_config) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is code changes, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers in instruction.md match test assertions (e.g., _onDidFinishTestFunctionCallbacks, runDaemonForContext, decorateServer).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names exact variable names, parameter names, and literal values to be used ('_onDidFinishTestFunctionCallbacks', 'noShutdown', 'timeout = 0', 'actionTimeout = 5000', 'for...of'), removing the localization/design work.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: SKILL.md edits are scoped to frontmatter allowed-tools addition, description tweak, and specific tasks link — localized, not full rewrites.
